title: plectranthus burorum
intro: Plectranthus burorum, also known as the Burundi plectranthus or Burundian coleus, is a perennial plant native to the highlands of Burundi in Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Plectranthus burorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
